notes.art_direction: coded product UI + rendered identity layer. STRICT 8-bit character style.
notes.generation_pipeline: Feed the 'prompt' field to AI image generator. AI outputs will have a #FF00FF background.
notes.scripting_pipeline: Python/PIL script reads 'filename', applies 'processing.type' (keying magenta, cropping/slicing), and uses Nearest-Neighbor to scale to 'processing.target_size'.

assets.prompt: Chunky 8-bit / NES-style uniform background texture. Dark arcade stone with subtle cracks, cool blue-black tones (#070B12, #15284B). Limited palette, hard pixel edges only. Fill entire frame. No background. No anti-aliasing, no blur, no noise.

Chunky 8-bit / NES-style sprite rendering. A simple red warning flag map marker on a base. Centered. Thick black outlines, limited color palette, hard pixel edges only. Solid bright magenta (#FF00FF) background. No anti-aliasing, no gradients, no noise.

Chunky 8-bit / NES-style sprite rendering. A simple square arcade beacon map marker, yellow core, blue frame. Centered. Thick black outlines, limited color palette, hard pixel edges only. Solid bright magenta (#FF00FF) background. No anti-aliasing, no gradients, no noise.
